description: Skill compilation specialist — the forge master. Invoke to access all SKF workflows via guided menu.
Initialize forge environment — detect tools and set capability tier (Quick/Forge/Forge+/Deep)
Discover what to skill in a large repo — produces recommended skill briefs
Design a skill scope through guided discovery
Compile a skill from a brief — supports --batch for multiple briefs
Fast skill from a package name or GitHub URL — no brief needed
Consolidated project stack skill with integration patterns — code-mode or compose-mode
Smart regeneration preserving [MANUAL] sections after source changes
Drift detection between skill and current source code
Pre-code stack feasibility verification against architecture and PRD documents
Improve architecture doc using verified skill data and VS feasibility findings
Cognitive completeness verification — quality gate before export
Package for distribution and inject context into CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/.cursorrules
Rename a skill across all its versions — transactional copy-verify-delete with platform context rebuild
Drop a specific skill version or an entire skill — soft (deprecate) or hard (purge) with platform context rebuild
Cross-cutting principles and patterns — JiT loaded by workflows via index lookup
Show current lifecycle position, active skill briefs, and forge tier status
